steps.name: Fetch All Merchant Applications
steps.description: To fetch all merchant applications under a partner

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'

resParams.name: applicationId
resParams.description: The Application ID used to uniquely identify a merchant's application.

resParams.name: applicationStatus
resParams.description: Describes the status of the application. The possible values are:

possibleValues.description: The application has been created, and the Web KYB URL has been generated. The merchant is now required to fill in necessary information through the Web KYB.
The merchant has finished filling in the Web KYB and submitted it for processing.
The application is still under processing, and additional data is required from the merchant.
Both the merchant signatories and UBOs have signed the application.
The application has been processed and rejected.
The application has been processed and accepted. It is now pending merchant creation and onboarding.
The merchant account has been created. At this stage, the Merchant ID and Store ID will be returned in the status call.

resParams.name: corporateId
resParams.description: Corporate ID of the respective merchant.

resParams.name: country
resParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase, representing the primary location of the merchant.

resParams.name: createdAt
resParams.description: Date of application creation in ISO string format

resParams.name: lastUpdatedAt
resParams.description: Date of last updation recorded with the merchant application in ISO string format

resParams.name: webKybUrl
resParams.description: The Web KYB URL generated for the application.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
